_meta.purpose: Human-readable feature catalogue. CORE features are always in the model; OPTIONAL features form the per-asset search pool (feature_search.py picks a subset by Train CV AUC-PR). PROPOSED features are Claude-authored DSL expressions validated fail-closed into features_proposed.json (ids 501+). Every feature is causal by construction.
_meta.computed_in: features.py (core_frame / optional_frame) + the DSL evaluator for proposed
_meta.selection: per_asset_feature_overrides.json holds {ticker: [optional/proposed ids]}; the manifest is CORE + those, ordered by id.
